scripts.copy:assets: cp node_modules/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free/css/all.min.css ./fontawesome.min.css && sed -i '' 's|../webfonts|webfonts|g' ./fontawesome.min.css && sed -i '' 's|font-display:block|font-display:swap|g' ./fontawesome.min.css && rm -rf webfonts && cp -r node_modules/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free/webfonts ./
scripts.dev: npm run copy:assets && concurrently "npm run watch:css" "npm run watch:js"
scripts.build: npm run copy:assets && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && node cache-buster.js && node generar-sitemap.js
